'''zhayozho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mycostatin|mycostatin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-y-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mycostatin|mycostatin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| zhayozho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæyezheth|zhæyezheth]] || [[word:zhæyezhej|zhæyezhej]] || [[word:zhæyezhesh|zhæyezhesh]] || [[word:zhæyezhe|zhæyezhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhayoyozhoth|zhayoyozhoth]] || [[word:zhayoyozhoj|zhayoyozhoj]] || [[word:zhayoyozhosh|zhayoyozhosh]] || [[word:zhayoyozho|zhayoyozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhayozhoth|zhayozhoth]] || [[word:zhayozhoj|zhayozhoj]] || [[word:zhayozhosh|zhayozhosh]] || [[word:zhayozho|zhayozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhayofzhoth|zhayofzhoth]] || [[word:zhayofzhoj|zhayofzhoj]] || [[word:zhayofzhosh|zhayofzhosh]] || [[word:zhayofzhof|zhayofzhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhayozhotho|zhayozhotho]] || [[word:zhayozhojo|zhayozhojo]] || [[word:zhayozhosho|zhayozhosho]] || [[word:zhayozhoko|zhayozhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhayozhoth|zhayozhoth]] || [[word:zhayozhoj|zhayozhoj]] || [[word:zhayozhosh|zhayozhosh]] || [[word:zhayozho|zhayozho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhayozhothol|zhayozhothol]] || [[word:zhayozhojol|zhayozhojol]] || [[word:zhayozhoshol|zhayozhoshol]] || [[word:zhayozhokol|zhayozhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhayozhothotho|zhayozhothotho]] || [[word:zhayozhojojo|zhayozhojojo]] || [[word:zhayozhoshosho|zhayozhoshosho]] || [[word:zhayozhoko|zhayozhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhayozhothon|zhayozhothon]] || [[word:zhayozhojon|zhayozhojon]] || [[word:zhayozhoshon|zhayozhoshon]] || [[word:zhayozhokon|zhayozhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhayozhothoro|zhayozhothoro]] || [[word:zhayozhojoro|zhayozhojoro]] || [[word:zhayozhoshoro|zhayozhoshoro]] || [[word:zhayozhokoro|zhayozhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
